channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SUNDRMBRAK] Trading Window Closed for Sundaram Brake Linings Ltd Until 48 Hours After Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Sundaram Brake Linings Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons, insiders, and their immediate relatives from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of audited financial results for the quarter ending 31st March 2026. The closure is in accordance with the Company’s ‘Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading’ and SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The date of the Board Meeting to approve the audited financial results will be informed separately. Connected persons, designated persons, and their immediate relatives are advised not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period.

  • Trading window closed from 1st April 2026 until 48 hours after Q1 2026 results
  • Closure in accordance with the Company’s ‘Code of Conduct for Prohibition of Insider Trading’ and SEBI regulations
  • Date of Board Meeting to approve audited financial results to be informed separately
  • Connected and designated persons advised not to trade in Company's securities during closure period

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNDARAM BRAKE LININGS LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ENGINERSIN] Engineers India Ltd: Two Non-official Independent Directors Complete Their Tenure
item.description:
According to a recent intimation by Engineers India Ltd, two Non-official Independent Directors, Shri Deepak Mhaskey and Smt. Karuna Gopal Vartakavi, have completed their tenure and ceased to be a part of the company's Board as of 28.03.2026. This development comes in line with the regulations set by the Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, Government of India.

  • Shri Deepak Mhaskey and Smt. Karuna Gopal Vartakavi have completed their tenure as Non-official Independent Directors in Engineers India Ltd.
  • Their tenure ended on 28.03.2026 as per the regulations of the Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, Government of India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENGINEERS INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ADROITINFO] Adroit Infotech Ltd Closes Trading Window for Financial Results
item.description:
Adroit Infotech Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for Designated Persons from April 1, 2026. The closure is in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed until 48 hours after the dissemination of the Audited Financial Results (Consolidated and Standalone) for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of the Audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course. Designated Persons have been informed not to trade in the securities of the Company during the aforesaid period.

  • Adroit Infotech Ltd closes trading window for Designated Persons from April 1, 2026.
  • Closure is in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015.
  • Trading window to remain closed until 48 hours after the dissemination of Audited Financial Results for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Date of Board Meeting for the declaration of Audited Financial Results to be intimated later.
  • Designated Persons informed not to trade in the securities of the Company during the closure period.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adroit Infotech Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SUNPHARMA] Sun Pharma's Fibromun Fails to Meet PFS Endpoint in Soft Tissue Sarcoma, but Shows Promise in Glioblastoma and Skin Cancers
item.description:
Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Limited has released updates on Fibromun and Nidlegy. The Phase II FLASH study of Fibromun in last-line soft tissue sarcoma did not meet its primary endpoint for Progression Free Survival (PFS). However, in GLIOSTAR, an improvement in survival was observed in the subgroup of patients with limited exposure to alkylating agents. The GLIOSTUN clinical trial has completed patient enrollment in the United States and is expected to report survival data in September 2026. A new Phase III registrational study (FIBROSARC-2) is planned for Fibromun, with overall survival as the primary endpoint. Nidlegy, a biopharmaceutical product developed for the treatment of skin cancers, is preparing a new submission in Europe and a Phase III clinical trial in locally advanced melanoma is ongoing in the United States.

  • Fibromun failed to meet PFS endpoint in soft tissue sarcoma
  • GLIOSTAR showed improvement in survival in subgroup of patients with limited exposure to alkylating agents
  • GLIOSTUN has completed patient enrollment and will report survival data in September 2026
  • A new Phase III registrational study (FIBROSARC-2) is planned for Fibromun
  • Nidlegy is preparing a new submission in Europe and a Phase III clinical trial is ongoing in the United States

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUN PHARMACEUTICAL INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [AEGISVOPAK] Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd to Sell 10% Stake in Subsidiary to Itochu Corporation
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement (SPA 1), Shareholders’ Agreement, and Share Purchase Agreement (SPA 2) with Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited, Itochu Corporation, Mr. Murad Moledina, and Mr. Sudhir Omprakash Malhotra. The agreements are in respect to the sale of 10% equity stake in ATPL to Itochu for INR. 80,32,00,000. The Company will continue to hold 86% equity stake in ATPL post the sale. The SHA provides certain rights to the Company and Itochu with respect to ATPL, including reserved matter rights.

  • Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd to sell 10% equity stake in its subsidiary Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited to Itochu Corporation
  • The deal is worth INR. 80,32,00,000
  • Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd will continue to hold 86% equity stake in Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited post the sale
  • Share Purchase Agreement (SPA 1), Shareholders’ Agreement, and Share Purchase Agreement (SPA 2) have been entered
  • SHA provides certain rights to the Company and Itochu with respect to Aegis Terminal (Pipavav) Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Aegis Vopak Terminals Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [MPHASIS] Mphasis Ltd Responds to Fine Levied by Stock Exchanges Over Governance Operations
item.description:
Mphasis Ltd, a prominent player in the IT sector, has responded to a fine levied by the stock exchanges for alleged non-compliance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The issue pertains to the selection and appointment of a Chairperson and the convening of a Board meeting during a specific period. The company has clarified its stance, stating that the governance operations remained unaffected and that it maintains continuous compliance with Regulation 17 of the SEBI Listing Regulations. A waiver application has been submitted to the stock exchanges.

  • Mphasis Ltd fined by stock exchanges for non-compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations
  • Issue pertains to selection and appointment of Chairperson and convening of Board meeting
  • Company maintains that governance operations remained unaffected
  • Company continuously complies with Regulation 17 of SEBI Listing Regulations
  • Waiver application submitted to the stock exchanges

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MPHASIS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [HINDPETRO] Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd: Two Independent Directors Cease Tenure
item.description:
Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd has announced that two of its Independent Directors, Shri Bechan Lal and Smt. Sharda Singh Kharwar, have completed their tenure and ceased to be directors of the company effective March 28, 2026. This announcement comes in accordance with Regulation 30 and Schedule III Part A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd has announced the completion of tenure for two Independent Directors.
  • Shri Bechan Lal and Smt. Sharda Singh Kharwar have ceased to be directors of the company as of March 28, 2026.
  • The announcement is in compliance with Regulation 30 and Schedule III Part A of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HINDUSTAN PETROLEUM CORPORATION LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PAJSON] Pajson Agro India Ltd: CFO Resigns, Appoints New CFO with Extensive Experience
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Pajson Agro India Ltd has clarified that their former CFO, Mr. Ajit Kumar, has not ceased his employment but has stepped down from his role as CFO due to personal responsibilities. He has been appointed as Vice President — Finance Department of the Company. The Company has appointed Mr. Nitan Garg as the new Chief Financial Officer, who brings over 18 years of experience across various sectors.

  • Mr. Ajit Kumar, former CFO of Pajson Agro India Ltd, has stepped down from his role due to personal responsibilities.
  • Mr. Ajit Kumar continues to be associated with the Company as Vice President — Finance Department.
  • Mr. Nitan Garg has been appointed as the new Chief Financial Officer.
  • Mr. Nitan Garg has over 18 years of experience in various sectors including FMCG, Beverages, Alcobev, Pharmaceuticals, and Agro-Commodities.
  • The appointment of Mr. Nitan Garg is expected to strengthen the financial leadership of the Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pajson Agro India Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GAIL] Gail (India) Ltd: Non-Official Independent Directors Cease Tenure
item.description:
Gail (India) Ltd has announced that four Non-Official Independent Directors, namely Shri Akhilesh Jain, Shri Sanjay Kashyap, Smt. Kangabam Inaocha Devi, and Shri Yajurvendra Anil Mahajan, appointed by MoP&NG, Government of India, have ceased to be Directors on the Board of the Company effective from 28.03.2026, upon completion of their tenure.

  • Four Non-Official Independent Directors have completed their tenure.
  • Shri Akhilesh Jain, Shri Sanjay Kashyap, Smt. Kangabam Inaocha Devi, and Shri Yajurvendra Anil Mahajan are the directors who have ceased to be on the Board of Gail (India) Ltd.
  • Their tenure ended on 27.03.2026, and the change was effective from 28.03.2026.
  • This disclosure is in compliance with SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The news pertains to Gail (India) Ltd, a Government of India Undertaking and a Maharatna Company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GAIL (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window and Upcoming Board Meeting for FY 2025-26 Results
item.description:
Coforge Ltd, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, has announced the closure of the trading window for all designated persons and their immediate relatives, effective from April 01, 2026. The closure is for the purpose of considering the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and other matters. The trading window will reopen 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results. The Company's Board of Directors will meet on May 05, 2026, to consider and approve the audited consolidated and standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also consider the proposal of payment of Interim Dividend for the Financial Year 2025-26 and determine the Record date for the purpose of the Interim Dividend. A conference call with Analysts and Institutional Investors is scheduled after the Board meeting, and the details will be disclosed on the Company's website.

  • Closure of trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives from April 01, 2026
  • Board meeting scheduled on May 05, 2026, to consider and approve financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Consideration of Interim Dividend payment for Financial Year 2025-26
  • Determination of Record date for Interim Dividend payment
  • Scheduled conference call with Analysts and Institutional Investors after the Board meeting

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
